══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kenku — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:13+9=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Kenku — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kenku — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Kenku — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Kenku — Unarmored Caster.
→ Kenku — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 20] FAIL! 30 necrotic damage. HP: 37/67
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Kenku — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 37/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Kenku — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 4 ══

ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.

══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Kenku — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 8/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (8/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kenku — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Kenku — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 26 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
